zh.lifeSummary: 當Honor Stephens於1601年2月2日出生在英國戴文普萊姆斯時，她的父親William Stephens26歲，母親Mary Woode22歲。她於1622年11月22日與William Ham在英國英格蘭戴文普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1667年11月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德波斯姆斯享年66歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德波斯姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Honor Stephens于1601年2月2日出生在英国戴文普萊姆斯时，她的父亲William Stephens26岁，母亲Mary Woode22岁。她于1622年11月22日与William Ham在英国英格兰戴文普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1667年11月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德波斯姆斯享年66岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德波斯姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: Honor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Honour ;  the dominant spelling of both the vocabulary word and the given name in the United States today. This is now the more frequent spelling of the name in Britain also, used, for example, for the actress  Honor Blackman  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Honour
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the quality (via Old French, from Latin honor). The name was popular with the Puritans in the 17th century and has remained in modest use to the present day.

historicEvents.description: Reigns of Louis XIII and Louis XIV. Royal power at its peak. France dominates Europe, French culture spreads. Start of large-scale sea trade.

historicEvents.title: 30 Years War
historicEvents.description: Ferdinand II was trying to force the people to follow Catholicism. The 30 years war was a battle of religion with the Protestants and Catholics, in the Holy Roman Empire.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Honor Stephens was born on 2 February 1601, in Plymouth, Devon, England, her father, William Stephens, was 26 and her mother, Mary Woode, was 22. She married William Ham on 22 November 1622, in Plymouth, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 11 November 1667, in Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 66, and was buried in Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Honor Stephens est née le 2 février 1601, à Plymouth, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Stephens, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary Woode, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William Ham le 22 novembre 1622, à Plymouth, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 novembre 1667, à Portsmouth, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Portsmouth, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Honor Stephens am 2. Februar 1601 in Plymouth, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Stephens 26 und ihre Mutter Mary Woode 22. Sie hat am 22. November 1622 in Plymouth, Devon, England, United Kingdom William Ham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. November 1667 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America und wurde in Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Honor Stephens è nata il il 2 febbraio 1601 nel Plymouth, Devon, England, sua padre, William Stephens, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mary Woode, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William Ham il 22 novembre 1622, nel Plymouth, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 novembre 1667, nel Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Honor Stephensが1601年2月2日にイギリスデボンプリモウスで生まれた時，父William Stephensは26歳，母Mary Woodeは22歳であった。1622年11月22日にイギリスイギリスデボンプリモウスでWilliam Hamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1667年11月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドポルトスモウスで66歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドポルトスモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.Plymouth St Andrew, Devon, England: 영국 데폰 플림우스 플림우스 스트 앤드루
ko.Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 포츠모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Honor Stephens(이)가 1601년 2월 2일 영국 데폰 플림우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Stephens(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Woode(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1622년 11월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 플림우스에서 William Ham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1667년 11월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 포츠모우스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 포츠모우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Honor Stephens nasceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1601, em Plymouth, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Stephens, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary Woode, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William Ham em 22 de novembro de 1622, em Plymouth, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1667, em Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Honor Stephens родилась 2 февраля 1601 г. в местности плимоут, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Stephens было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Woode, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Ham 22 ноября 1622 г. в местности плимоут, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 ноября 1667 г. в местности порцмоут, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности порцмоут, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.
